name: Easy Macaroni Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup CHOPPED GREEN OR RED PEPPER
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the mayo, vinegar, mustard, sugar, salt, and pepper until smooth.
2. Add the macaroni, celery, green/red pepper, and onion; toss to coat well.
3. Cover and refrigerate at least two hours to blend flavors.
4. Makes five cups.
